text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm in town one day when I see<n>Narita Taishin
holding something that<n>looks like a present.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Creek... I-I... I got this for—no, that<n>doesn't get any
of my feelings<n>across!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the sincerity training her<n>friends put her
through the other day<n>has paid off? It looks like
she's<n>ready to hand over her gift.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But it also looks like she's having a<n>lot of trouble
taking that final step...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Crap, she's here...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait, Taishin! ♪ Thanks<n>for inviting
me out today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Um... well, we're not really going<n>anywhere... I... I
actually have a<n>present I need to give—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I see! You need my help picking<n>out a present
for a friend?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Shoot, now what do I do? I can't<n>figure out when
to give her the<n>present!)

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Don't miss out on today's sales!<n>Why not thank
the important people in<n>your life with a little gift? ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Urk... Yeah, I've gotta do this. Better<n>spit it out
soon...)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, are you okay? I bet there's a<n>lot on your
mind! Why don't we take<n>a break? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! That was scrumptious! What a<n>wonderful
meal! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dammit, I just can't do it... Why is<n>this so hard?!
I'm such a dummy!)

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Here, honey! I got you a present! I<n>tried really hard
to choose something<n>perfect for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I chose my gift for Creek carefully<n>too. I wanted
to choose something<n>that would make her really
happy...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(C'mon, get yourself together,<n>Taishin! You told
yourself you were<n>gonna give her the gift today!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Okay. I'm gonna do it. I've gotta—)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The person you want to get a present<n>for must
mean the world to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I can tell just from that look on yourface. We have known each otherfor a long time, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, come on! It's now or never.<n>Just be
sincere!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. She really is important<n>to me. So...
here! This is for you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I invited you out today to give you<n>this, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I actually bought this apron ages<n>ago.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I.. I wanted to give it to you earlier, but<n>I couldn't
bring myself to do it, and<n>time kept on passing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I made up my mind! I told myself<n>I'd be
sincere with you, so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for everything, Creek. Really.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you went to all that<n>trouble for my
sake! I'm just—I'm<n>so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Biiig hug time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. But not too long.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Watching from afar, I see Narita<n>Taishin has finally
given Super Creek<n>her present. Then, the next
day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well... You helped me during my<n>training, and
I don't like owing people<n>favors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Don't treat me like some<n>kid!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
From a distance, I see Narita Taishin<n>shoving her
way through a crowd of<n>people as she makes a
beeline for<n>me.
choice_data_list: Did you hand over your gift?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, shut up! Now's not the time for<n>your stupid
questions!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's just a little thank-you in return,<n>Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I said I don't want anything! It's the<n>thought that
counts or whatever!
